summary:
Function: #!/bin/bash

echo "starting test..."

expected_needle="haystack"

go run main.go > tmp

actual_needle=$(cat tmp)

rm tmp

if [[ $expected_needle == $actual_needle ]] ; then
  echo "success!"
  exit 0
else
  echo "failed :("
  echo "expected: $expected_needle"
  echo "actual: $actual_needle"
  exit 1
fi
